visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with her hair in a bun wears purple plaid pajamas in a dimly lit bedroom setting. She opens a wooden closet door, retrieves a white sports jersey with blue accents, and brings it to her nose to smell it, showing a concerned and slightly disgusted facial expression. (2) Suddenly, another woman appears wearing a large white cardboard box fashioned to look like a washing machine over her head. She wears a white sleeveless dress and holds a blue bottle of Lenor scent beads toward the camera, pointing at it enthusiastically. (3) The woman in pajamas is now seen smelling the white jersey again, this time with a peaceful smile and closed eyes, surrounded by soft-focus light overlays. (4) The setting transitions to a bright, modern gym. The woman is performing lunges with dumbbells and running on a treadmill. She pauses, pulls at the neckline of her workout top, and looks annoyed. (5) The washing machine-headed character reappears in the gym background, offering the same bottle of scent beads while performing a small dance. (6) The woman at the gym is seen smiling widely, looking refreshed as she continues her workout. (7) The scene shifts to the interior of a subway train. The woman is standing and holding a yellow handrail. She wears a blue top and a white sheer cover-up. She looks at a person off-camera, then adjusts her strap and smiles confidently. (8) A series of close-up shots show the product: a bottle of Lenor scent beads being poured into a small blue cap, and the pink and white beads being displayed in a glass bowl. (9) The woman returns to a bright indoor space, smiling and posing with the product bottles.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 衣櫃裡拿出衣服. (2) [Variety]: (聞). (3) [Subtitle]: 怎麼衣服洗過還是有味道. (4) [Subtitle]: 因為你洗沒放芳香豆！ (5) [Logo]: Lenor 蘭諾. [Slogan]: 鎖住乾淨 持續衣香. (6) [Subtitle]: 好清新. [Variety]: 啊~. (7) [Subtitle]: 運動訓練時. (8) [Subtitle]: 明明有洗衣服 沒流什麼汗 怎麼還那麼臭啊. (9) [Subtitle]: 因為你洗衣 沒加芳香豆！ (10) [Subtitle]: 雨天的捷運上. (11) [Variety]: (地板溼答答). (12) [Variety]: (怎麼有帥哥). (13) [Subtitle]: 旁邊的帥哥. (14) [Subtitle]: 啊對！還好我洗衣有加蘭諾 狀態隨時OK. (15) [Subtitle]: 蘭諾衣物芳香豆 讓你外出一整天 回到家仍然有 淡淡且剛剛好的香味. (16) [Subtitle]: 而且讓你換季 或是久放衣櫃的衣物 遠離換季地獄. [Slogan]: 遠離換季地獄. (17) [Subtitle]: 用法超簡單！只要你洗衣多一步 輕鬆又簡單. (18) [Slogan]: 蘭諾衣物芳香豆 隨時保持最佳狀態.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 secondary female actor as 'washing machine' character.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, initially in purple pajamas, later in workout gear and casual blue subway attire.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Features a bedroom with a wooden closet, a brightly lit gym with treadmills and weight equipment, a subway car with yellow handles, and a clean white laundry area.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with an upbeat, rhythmic electronic BGM. A woman's voice sounds frustrated and confused. The sound of a closet door opening is heard. (2) A second, very energetic female voice shouts a slogan. A percussive 'ding' sound effect emphasizes the product reveal. (3) The first woman sighs happily with a soft, melodic BGM swell. (4) Background sounds of a treadmill motor and rhythmic footfalls. The woman speaks with a strained, dissatisfied tone. (5) The energetic voice returns with a 'whoosh' transition SFX. The sound of small beads rattling against plastic is clearly audible. (6) A subway chime sounds, followed by a low ambient hum of a train. The woman's voice is now calm and confident in an internal monologue style. (7) The final section features a fast-paced, professional voice-over detailing product features over a continuous high-tempo electronic beat. Frequent 'pop' and 'sparkle' SFX punctuate the narrative.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Problem Identification -> Solution Intervention -> Multi-scenario Proof -> Instructional Demo -> Final CTA.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To demonstrate the effectiveness of Lenor scent beads in eliminating stubborn odors from clothing across different daily life scenarios (closet storage, intense exercise, and humid public transport).

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of the product, brand name mentioned in subtitles and audio, and a clear demonstration of benefits.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a humorous 'washing machine' character to create a memorable and engaging brand mascot, effectively contrasting daily frustrations with product-driven satisfaction.
